a.xlink:title: Returns the maximum amount of the given resource.
Sets the forced handicap of the player.
Attaches a PlayerScore entity to a player.
Detaches a PlayerScore entity from the player.
Adds a score to the given team.
Returns a value indicating the team score (and higher is better).
Sets the current amount of resource the given entity will have.
Gives an entity some resource.
Takes an entity some resource.
Give several random weapons and ammo to the entity.
Gives an entity some resource but not more than a limit.
Called when a client spawns in the server.
putting a client as observer in the server
Kills player as a result of team change.
Sets the team of the player.
Sets the team of the player with all sanity checks.
Moves player to the specified team.
Assigns the given player to a team that will make the game most balanced.
Switches a bot from one team to another if teams are not balanced.
Join an existing minigame session.
Create a new minigame session.
Called when the player changes color with the "color" command.
Takes an entity some resource but not less than a limit.
Updates the handicap of all players.
you have to define this for pre-menu initialization.
Adds a score to the player's team's scores.
Adds a score to both the player and the team.
